subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth from God, the Lord of all worlds, and therein We make mention of him who hath turned towards the Countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی الله رب العالمین و نذکر فیه من اقبل الی الوجه لیکون له
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
